title: ECL spec profile v1 (vendored)
description: Vendored copy of eidolons-ecl/schemas/per-eidolon/spec.v1.json for self-contained SPECTRA validation. Validates the ECL envelope YAML frontmatter for a SPECTRA spec payload. Source-of-truth is the central ECL spec at Rynaro/eidolons-ecl; re-vendor when ECL publishes a new profile version.

eidolon.description: Eidolon slug that emitted this artefact.

kind.description: Artefact kind slug. MUST equal the envelope's artifact.kind.

thread_id.description: RECOMMENDED: mirror the envelope's thread_id so the artefact carries its own provenance.

evidence_anchors_count.description: Number of path:line citations in the body.
